case_title: LUCIANA BORRADORI et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFFS LUCIANA BORRADORI AND ETTORE BORRADORI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT VERDICT AS VOID FOR LACK OF PROPER SERVICE OF AWARD OF ARBITRATOR AND SEEKING LEAVE TO PRESENT PLAINTIFF'S CASE. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. CCP 473.5 - NO DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND PROBLEM DID NOT ARISE FROM FAILURE OF SERVICE OF A SUMMONS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORRADORI, LUCIANA BORRADORI, ETTORE JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-20-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

ARBITRATOR EDWARD CHARLES CASEY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-19-2005 THROUGH NOV-17-2005.
RESPONSE TO OSC FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. THAT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF(S), LUCIANA AND ETTORE BORRADORI IS DENIED. STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO DEFENDANT(S). SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-28-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dan Cortright of Walsworth Franklin Bevins & McCall, 781-7072, appearing for defendant and responding party
Richard P. Koch, 397-1060, appearing for plaintiff and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS LUCIANA BORRADORI and ETTORE BORRADORI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT VERDICT AS VOID FOR LACK OF PROPER SERVICE OF AWARD OF ARBITRATOR AND SEEKING LEAVE TO PRESENT PLAINTIFF'S CASE is denied. CCP 473.5 - no default judgment and problem did not arise from failure of service of a summons. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/DS) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF LUCIANA BORRADORI, ETTORE BORRADORI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED DUE TO FAILURE TO SERVE REQUEST FOR TRIAL DE NOVO WITH THE MOVING PAPERS.
Judge Harold Kahn, Reporter LaVena Ward, CSR #7077. (301/HEK/DS)
